# js-lib

A tiny TypeScript package used as a decon-rs test fixture.

## Prerequisites

- Node.js 20 or newer
- npm 10 or newer

## Install

```bash
npm install
```

## Environment

```bash
cp .env.example .env
```

Set `API_KEY` in `.env` before starting.

> Commands are illustrative — do not create files inside this frozen fixture.

## Run

```bash
npm run build
npm start
```
